name: Beans with Tuna
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Smoked white beans, soaked overnight, drained
2 cans Water-packed white tuna, drained and chopped (6-1/2 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the crushed garlic and sauté until golden brown. Remove the garlic with a slotted spoon and discard.
2. In a crockpot, combine the remaining ingredients: beans, 1 1/2 quarts water, tomatoes, tuna, basil, salt, and pepper. Stir to mix.
3. Cook on HIGH for 2 hours. Lower the heat to LOW and cook for an additional 8 hours.
4. Stir in any remaining ingredients and return to HIGH heat. Cook for an additional 30 minutes.
